film.title: Terror Trap
film.overview: While driving, an estranged couple's car is hit twice. A sheriff takes them to a motel where they hear disturbing noises from a room, realizing they're part of a deadly game.

dialogues.dialogue: No disrespect.  None taken.  Can't afford to have pride on a night like this, right?  That's right.  So, did you call a tow truck?
Took care of them very well.  All right.  Well, I am proud to be an American.  And I hope that you are too.  I am.
We lament her loss yet we rejoice in gaining the knowledge  that she still continues to look down upon us.  Let's make Sydney proud.  Go in peace.  This funeral has ended.
